title: Degraded mode — results provided without SLO targets
code_snippet:
# User provides k6 output:
# Requests: 150000, Rate: 2500/s
# http_req_duration: avg=42ms p50=18ms p95=85ms p99=312ms p99.9=1.2s max=3.5s
# http_req_failed: 0.03%
# Checks: 99.97%
#
# User says: 'Here are the results, is the service healthy?'
expected_feedback: Degraded: Partial mode — results available but no SLOs defined. Can deliver statistical summary and anomaly flags (p99/p50 ratio = 17x suggests bimodal behavior; p99.9=1.2s tail latency). Cannot claim pass/fail or make capacity conclusions without SLO targets. Must NOT fabricate SLO compliance.
